since_last: 58% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.87%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC -0.21% · Gold +0.44% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 58% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.87%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.87%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +9.66%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +9.66%, NOW +4.72%, OKLO +4.15%, OKLO +4.15%, CRM +4.05%. Laggards: MU -2.81%, AMAT -2.66%, CRNC -2.39%, KLAC -2.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.67% at $173.71
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
